title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 370.090 - Operation without having filed certificate of approval prohibited
text:
370.090.  Operation without having filed certificate of approval prohibited. — No credit union shall operate in this state until it has filed with the secretary of state a copy of the certificate of approval issued to it by the director of the division of credit unions.
(RSMo 1939 § 5526, A.L. 1945 p. 689, A.L. 1945 p. 720, A. 1949 H.B. 2091, A.L. 1972 S.B. 502) 
Prior revision: 1929 § 5084
